title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN

section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
New building in tankers this week, clients of Minerva ordered two firm LNG dual-fuel 114k dwt LR2 product tankers at New Times, with the vessels set to deliver in 1Q and 2Q 2027. Source: Clarkson Platou (Hellas) ltd
